manifest.split_policy: primary oldest 80% calibration / newest 20% holdout; newer supplement-only boards freshness split
notes: Primary benchmark source remains the local Hugging Face export.
Supplement data only repairs missing fields or adds newer explicitly supplemental boards.
Stage 3 calibration slice built from benchmark_calibration records.
Stage 3 calibration slice built from benchmark_holdout records.
Stage 3 calibration slice built from benchmark_freshness records.
